University: University of Central Florida | Overall Rating: 4.0 | Ratings: Reputation: 4, Location: 4, Opportunities: 4, Facilities: 4, Internet: 1, Food: 1, Clubs: 4, Social: 4, Happiness: 4, Safety: 4 | Review: Loved my time at UCF. 63 south is bad and the internet can be quite poor basically anywhere on campus though.

Professor: Travis Meade | Course: COP3502C | Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Review: A name that will always be remembered in the UCF comp sci department, and not in a good way. His office smelled so bad and he was really weird towards his female TA. I can confirm that the rumors were true and that we were all uncomfortable. Meade marked a stain on UCF's name and I hope it doesn't happen again.
Professor: Travis Meade | Course: COP3502C | Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | Attendance: Not Mandatory | Grade Received: Audit/No Grade | Review: Is That The Hello Kitty Man?

Professor: Travis Meade | Course: COP3502C | Quality: 1.0 | Difficulty: 5.0 | For Credit: Yes | Attendance: Not Mandatory | Grade Received: Drop/Withdrawal | Review: Took this class during undergrad for CS1. He often started lectures 15 minutes early. During a semester when a hurricane devastated the area and some students had flooded apartments or no power, he refused to extend homework deadlines and told us to figure it out ourselves.
